PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-01-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $150.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HAMMONS, ANNA RUTH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF JASMINE D APAYNE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANNA RUTH HAMMONS IS NOT PRESENT, APPEARING IS WILLIAM HAMMONS (SON). PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-15-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT, CASE IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON JUNE 15TH AT 3:30PM THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE MATTER WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JASMINE D PAYNE. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT ANNA RUTH HAMMONS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION
